entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan (L.) Millsp., the crop studied for growth habit inheritance

entities.name: DETERMINATE GROWTH HABIT
entities.description: A growth habit (DT) that provides a production advantage in pigeonpea

entities.name: INDETERMINATE GROWTH HABIT
entities.description: A growth habit (IDT) in pigeonpea governed by a single dominant allele

entities.name: SEMIDETERMINATE GROWTH HABIT
entities.description: A growth habit (SDT) in pigeonpea controlled by a single dominant allele

entities.name: CROSSING
entities.description: The use of F1, F2, and BC1F1 generations of 15 crosses involving six parents to study inheritance

entities.name: INHERITANCE
entities.description: The genetic transmission of growth habits from parents to offspring

entities.name: DT1
entities.description: The allele associated with the indeterminate (IDT) growth habit

entities.name: DT2A
entities.description: The allele associated with the semideterminate (SDT) growth habit

entities.name: DOMINANT ALLELE
entities.description: An allele that masks the expression of another allele, such as Dt1 masking Dt2a

entities.name: HOMOZYGOUS RECESSIVE GENOTYPE
entities.description: The genotype dt1dt1dt2dt2 which results in the determinate phenotype

entities.name: PHENOTYPE
entities.description: The observable physical expression of the genotype, such as the determinate phenotype
